summary: OpenAI-compatible API server implementation is well-structured and follows best practices.

observations.description: FastAPI application properly structured with lifespan management for backend lifecycle
Comprehensive test coverage with 36 tests for API endpoints including CORS, error handling, streaming
Proper OpenAI API compatibility for /v1/models, /v1/chat/completions, /v1/completions endpoints
Good error handling with structured ErrorResponse model

codeQuality.notes: Clean code structure, proper type hints, follows FastAPI patterns

testCoverage.notes: 36 tests covering all major endpoints and edge cases
